description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build code on Linux that runs on every push and on opened, synchronized, or reopened pull requests. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test different combinations of C++ compilers (g++-12, clang++-15) and build types (Debug, Release). For each combination, check out the repository, create a build environment, prepare the Vulkan SDK, configure the build with specific compiler flags, and then build the project in parallel.
